title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.105 - Bird appreciation day observed, when
text:
9.105.  Bird appreciation day observed, when. — The twenty-first of March shall be designated as "Bird Appreciation Day" to be observed by elementary and secondary schools, cities, state agencies and civic organizations with activities designed to enhance the knowledge and appreciation of Missouri birds.
(L. 2001 S.B. 58)
